pilots.name: UAD Feasibility on GPT-2 Small
pilots.description: Test co-occurrence-based unsupervised absorption detection on GPT-2 Small with pre-trained JumpReLU SAE. Build phi coefficient correlation matrix, run hierarchical clustering, validate against first-letter collision labels.
pilots.objective: Verify UAD achieves F1 >= 0.5 on GPT-2 Small within 15 minutes using 1k tokens.
steps: Load GPT-2 Small via TransformerLens
Load pre-trained JumpReLU SAE (gpt2-small-res-jb, layer 8, d_SAE=24,576)
Extract feature activation matrix on 1k OpenWebText tokens
Filter dead features (zero activation across all tokens)
Compute phi coefficient correlation matrix for top 100 most active features
Run hierarchical agglomerative clustering (Ward linkage, 50 clusters)
Identify same-cluster feature pairs
Validate against known first-letter collision pairs (from Iteration 1: feature 18486 -> c,i,o,p,u)
Compute precision, recall, F1
pass_criteria: F1 >= 0.5 compared to first-letter collision labels
pilots.fail_action: If F1 < 0.5, try alternative clustering methods (spectral, DBSCAN) or correlation metrics (mutual information, Jaccard). If still failing, mark UAD as high-risk and consider pivot to candidate B (general co-occurrence tool).

pilots.name: DFDA Feasibility on GPT-2 Small
pilots.description: Train tiny MLP to predict absorbed parent feature activation from child feature activation on known collision pairs from GPT-2 Small.
pilots.objective: Verify DFDA achieves >5% mean per-pair residual MSE improvement within 15 minutes.
steps: Load GPT-2 Small and pre-trained SAE (same as P1)
Identify 4 known absorbed pairs from Iteration 1 (parent=c, children=i,o,p,u via feature 18486)
Build training dataset: collect tokens where child fires but parent does not
For each pair, train tiny MLP: input=1 (child activation), hidden=64, output=1 (parent residual)
At inference: add MLP(child_activation) to parent_activation
Evaluate: per-pair residual MSE (predicted vs actual parent activation)
Measure reconstruction MSE change
Report mean improvement across pairs
pilots.fail_action: If no improvement, try larger MLP (256 hidden) or different loss function (huber loss). If compensation hurts reconstruction, mark DFDA as infeasible and focus paper on UAD only.

pilots.name: UAD Feasibility on Gemma-2B
pilots.description: Test UAD on Gemma-2B with pre-trained SAE from GemmaScope. Same protocol as P1 but on larger model.
pilots.objective: Verify UAD pipeline works on Gemma-2B and achieves F1 >= 0.45 within 15 minutes.
steps: Load Gemma-2B via TransformerLens
Load pre-trained SAE from GemmaScope (layer 8, width 16k or 24k)
Extract feature activation matrix on 1k tokens
Filter dead features
Compute phi coefficient correlation matrix for top 100 features
Run hierarchical clustering (Ward, 50 clusters)
Identify same-cluster pairs
Validate against first-letter features if detectable
Compute precision, recall, F1
pilots.fail_action: If Gemma-2B SAE loading fails, skip to Pythia-2.8B pilot. If F1 < 0.45 but pipeline works, proceed with caveat and increase sample size for full experiment.
pilots.notes: This is the critical cross-model validation pilot. If SAE loading fails, immediately try Pythia-2.8B.

pilot_decision_matrix.all_pass: Proceed with all full experiments (E1-E9). Full steam ahead on cand_a.
pilot_decision_matrix.p1_p2_pass_only: Proceed with GPT-2 Small focused experiments (E1, E2, E5, E6, E7, E8). Skip Gemma/Pythia cross-validation. Paper scopes to GPT-2 Small with multi-seed robustness.
pilot_decision_matrix.p1_pass_only: UAD works but DFDA fails. Proceed with UAD-only experiments (E1-E4, E7). Paper focuses on unsupervised detection without compensation claim.
pilot_decision_matrix.p2_pass_only: DFDA works but UAD F1 is marginal. Re-tune UAD hyperparameters (cluster count, correlation metric). If still marginal, consider candidate B (general co-occurrence tool).
pilot_decision_matrix.p3_fails: Gemma-2B validation fails. Try Pythia-2.8B. If both fail, scope paper to GPT-2 Small only with explicit limitation discussion.
pilot_decision_matrix.none_pass: REFINE: Both UAD and DFDA pilots fail. Consider pivot to candidate B (general co-occurrence analysis), candidate C (absorption stability across seeds), or candidate D (absorption as quality diagnostic).

go_no_go_gates.if_passed: Proceed to full UAD experiments on GPT-2 Small
go_no_go_gates.if_failed: Re-tune UAD hyperparameters (clustering method, correlation metric, feature count). If still failing after 2 attempts, PIVOT.

go_no_go_gates.condition: P3 (UAD Gemma-2B) F1 >= 0.45 OR Pythia-2.8B equivalent >= 0.45
go_no_go_gates.if_passed: Proceed with cross-model full experiments (E3, E4)
go_no_go_gates.if_failed: If F1 >= 0.4 but < 0.45, proceed with caveat and larger sample size. If F1 < 0.4, scope paper to GPT-2 Small only.
Downgrade DFDA to supplementary. Paper focuses on UAD only.
